headlines.title: Nvidia B300 server prices double in China amid chip smuggling crackdown
headlines.summary: Strong demand for AI computing equipment in China has nearly doubled prices for Nvidia's B300 servers to about $1 million each as black-market supply dries up.

headlines.title: OpenAI cleared for AWS and Google Cloud deployment
headlines.summary: OpenAI receives clearance for AWS and Google Cloud integration, while enterprise agents face new security concerns over hidden web-page commands.

headlines.title: GPT-5.5 vs GPT-5.4 comparison shows modest improvements
headlines.summary: GPT-5.5 offers 2x the per-token price with identical latency and context window, showing improvements on 9 of 10 benchmarks compared to GPT-5.4.

headlines.title: Musk and Altman face off in high-stakes AI trial
headlines.summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman face off in Oakland court over alleged betrayal and competing visions for AI development.

headlines.title: MIT researchers launch AI-driven disease diagnosis platform
headlines.summary: New AI-driven platform aims to help diagnose and treat diseases, founded by MIT researchers.

top_story.title: Nvidia B300 server prices double in China to $1 million amid supply crunch
top_story.summary: Strong demand for AI computing equipment in China has nearly doubled prices for Nvidia's B300 servers to about 7 million yuan ($1 million) each, as a crackdown on chip smuggling dries up black-market supply.
